instructions.title: Build Your Note System
instructions.text: Create a personal note template that works for YOU
guidelines: Explain why you chose each element

sections.title: My Heading Style
sections.instruction: How will you mark new topics?

sections.title: My List Format
sections.instruction: When will you use bullets vs numbers?

sections.title: My Page Layout
sections.instruction: How will you organize your notes?

sections.title: My Color System (optional)
sections.instruction: If using colors, what does each mean?

portfolio.title: Sample Notes
portfolio.instruction: Create one page of sample notes using your system

questions: Why did you choose these symbols?
How will this system help you study?
What makes this work for YOUR brain?

complete.message: You created your own note system! 🎨🏆
complete.audio: This is YOUR personal style - use it every day!

good.audio: Keep refining it as you learn

feedback.message: Every note-taker is unique - this is YOURS
